title: 2008 in Jungle Fight

infobox.value: [Jungle Fight 11](#Jungle_Fight_11) | September 13, 2008 | Windsor Barra Hotel | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")
[Jungle Fight 10](#Jungle_Fight_10) | July 12, 2008 | Windsor Barra Hotel | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")

[Jungle Fight 9: Warriors](#Jungle_Fight_9:_Warriors) | May 31, 2008 | [Maracanãzinho Gymnasium](/wiki/Maracan%C3%A3zinho "Maracanãzinho") | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")
[Jungle Fight 8](#Jungle_Fight_8) | April 6, 2008 | Team Nogueira Training Center | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil")

is the sixth year in the history of [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight"), a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") promotion based in Brazil. In 2008 Jungle Fight held 4 events beginning with, *Jungle Fight 8*.

["Jungle Fight 8"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-8-Jungle-Fight-8-7157). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150922060601/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-8-Jungle-Fight-8-7157) from the original on September 22, 2015.

["Jungle Fight 9: Warriors"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-9-Warriors-7799). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150503005656/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-9-Warriors-7799) from the original on May 3, 2015.

["Jungle Fight 10"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-10-Jungle-Fight-10-8042). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150910092627/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-10-Jungle-Fight-10-8042) from the original on September 10, 2015.

["Jungle Fight 11"](http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-11-Jungle-Fight-11-8723). [Sherdog](/wiki/Sherdog "Sherdog"). [Archived](https://web.archive.org/web/20150421200419/http://www.sherdog.com/events/JF-11-Jungle-Fight-11-8723) from the original on April 21, 2015.

The year **2008** is the sixth year in the history of [Jungle Fight](/wiki/Jungle_Fight "Jungle Fight"), a [mixed martial arts](/wiki/Mixed_martial_arts "Mixed martial arts") promotion based in Brazil. In 2008 Jungle Fight held 4 events beginning with, *Jungle Fight 8*.

## Events list

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2008_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Events list")]

Main article: [Jungle Fight § Events](/wiki/Jungle_Fight#Events "Jungle Fight")

| # | Event title | Date | Arena | Location |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 11 | [Jungle Fight 11](#Jungle_Fight_11) | September 13, 2008 | Windsor Barra Hotel | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |
| 10 | [Jungle Fight 10](#Jungle_Fight_10) | July 12, 2008 | Windsor Barra Hotel | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |
| 9 | [Jungle Fight 9: Warriors](#Jungle_Fight_9:_Warriors) | May 31, 2008 | [Maracanãzinho Gymnasium](/wiki/Maracan%C3%A3zinho "Maracanãzinho") | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |
| 8 | [Jungle Fight 8](#Jungle_Fight_8) | April 6, 2008 | Team Nogueira Training Center | [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil") |

## Jungle Fight 8

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2008_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Jungle Fight 8")]

Jungle Fight 8[[1]](#cite_note-1) was an event held on April 6, 2008 at The Team Nogueira Training Center in [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil").

### Results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2008_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Results")]

|  | Rodrigo Smurf | def. | Maicon Ribeiro | Decision (Unanimous) | 3 | 5:00 |  |
|  | Rodrigo Ribeiro | def. | Pedro Santos | TKO (Doctor Stoppage) | 1 | 5:00 |  |

|  | Erinaldo dos Santos Rodrigues | def. | Vinicius Lemes Bett | Decision (Unanimous) | 3 | 5:00 |  |

## Jungle Fight 9: Warriors

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2008_in_Jungle_Fight&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Jungle Fight 9: Warriors")]

Jungle Fight 9: Warriors[[2]](#cite_note-2) was an event held on May 31, 2008 at The [Maracanãzinho Gymnasium](/wiki/Maracan%C3%A3zinho "Maracanãzinho") in [Rio de Janeiro](/wiki/Rio_de_Janeiro "Rio de Janeiro"), [Brazil](/wiki/Brazil "Brazil").
